Guided VK collection workflow for the current target. Saves locally, builds an investigator-ready report, and keeps live extraction state visible when the popup is reopened.

Wall Snapshot & Output
Observed seeding, comments/likes sweep visibility, export, and report launch.

Wall Snapshot / Observed seed
Ready

—
Max posts
Include
Range mode
From
To
Snapshot range: full available wall history.
Review, export, and manage stored cases
Open the live report, export raw JSON, reset the current target, or manage stored target data in IndexedDB.
Storage management
Stored per target (user 123, group -123). Delete old targets if size grows over time.
—
Notes: Some VK data is private. If an API call returns “access denied”, that is normal. Large targets can take time — vkXtract spaces VK API calls globally to reduce blocks, and Wall is snapshot-by-design (you control max posts).
